prompt: Using the provided reference image, create a clean professional studio headshot portrait of the same person while preserving their face identity, blue hair, black shirt, ear plug, neck tattoo, silver chain, and ankh pendant. Keep the large square privacy blur over the face in the same style, centered over the facial features.
